display_information.name: ContextBot
display_information.description: Ask anything about any GitHub repo. Code context (MCP) + Slack history (RTS) + thread summarization (Slack AI) — secrets stripped at ingestion.
display_information.long_description: ContextBot connects ContextOS MCP to Slack. Connect any GitHub repo with /ctx connect, then ask questions and get AI answers backed by real code context — not hallucinations. Secrets are automatically detected and redacted before anything is stored or sent to an LLM. Real-Time Search pulls relevant Slack discussions into the answer. Thread summarization (Slack AI capability) gives the agent full conversation context before reasoning.

slash_commands.usage_hint: connect <url> | ask <q> | files <task> | repos | audit | use <name> | churn
